subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and the Testament! That which thou hadst written was noted and observed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی العهد و المیثاق آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید و مشاهده شد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
